subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and revealed the clear proofs unto a people who know that they who have attained on this Day are they [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات لقوم یعلمون ان الذین فازوا الیوم اولئک
